model: Chanel Rare Jewelled Eagle Black and Gold Runway Belt or Necklace
full_description:
CHANEL rare gold toned chain belt with black interwoven leather featuring a large jewelled eagle.

Focal point of the CHANEL 2001 Spring runway show.

May be worn as a belt or necklace.

Hook closure.

Marked CHANEL 01 P Made in France.

Indicative measurements : max. length approx. 94 cm (37 inches).
One size fits all - adjustable length (hook closure) for any smaller waist.

BELT CONDITION CHART
- New or never worn : item is in pristine condition with no noticeable imperfections
- Excellent : item has been used and may have not more than two minor imperfections
- Good : item has been used and may have more than two minor imperfections
- Fair : item has been used and has visible major alteration(s)

NOTES
- This is a preloved vintage item, therefore it might have imperfections.
- As a buyer, you are fully responsible for customs duties, other local taxes and any administrative procedures related to imports into the country of destination.
